findings.description: The HTML input example from the source is not included. The example demonstrates the prefix-based field selection by showing a non-prefixed field (`name="flag"`, バリデーション対象外) alongside prefixed fields (`name="form.userId"`, `name="form.password"`, バリデーション対象), which illustrates the concrete form field naming convention required for correct implementation.
findings.source_evidence: 入力画面のhtml例: `<input name="flag" type="hidden" />` (バリデーション対象外) and `<input name="form.userId" type="text" />`, `<input name="form.password" type="password" />` (バリデーション対象)
